title: Automated source link-rot checker + archival snapshot capture
context: Sustainability hardening: source links rot over time. This task adds an automated link-rot checker and archival snapshot capture so provenance stays resolvable. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Implement an automated checker that detects dead source links and captures archival snapshots to preserve provenance resolvability.
acceptanceCriteria: Checker detects broken/dead source links across all records and reports them.
Archival snapshots captured for sources to preserve provenance.
Checker runs on a schedule and locally via pnpm; documented.
output: A committed link-rot checker + archival snapshot tooling under the repo's tooling path.
